hero.headline: Create the digital guide for each of your properties
hero.subhead: Create your property's digital guide in minutes. It includes WiFi, check-in, house rules, emergency info, and AI-curated local recommendations, with automatic translation into your guest's language.
hero.ctaPrimary: Create my first guide for free

anyPlatform.title: Share your short-term rental information in one click
anyPlatform.body: Send the link to your guest before arrival. It works for bookings from any platform, and you can also print the QR code and place it in your property. Your guest doesn't have to download anything: they just open the link and have everything at hand, in one place. Host's WhatsApp, check-in, check-out, house rules, appliances, WiFi, local attractions, restaurants, nightlife, and AI-curated recommendations, all in one spot. That's the difference between an ordinary stay and a five-star one.

steps.label: They access all the info on their phone

problem.title: Fewer repeated questions, happier guests
before: Guests arrive from different platforms (Airbnb, Booking, VRBO...) and each one gives them different or incomplete information
They're not sure about house rules, or check-in and check-out times
They have to ask for the WiFi password, again
They don't know the area they're staying in, or where to eat, what to see, or where to go at night
They message you with questions at any hour, often the same ones over and over
after: Build your stay's digital guide in minutes
Share it with a link or a QR code. No app to install
Everything in one place: house rules, check-in and check-out times, WiFi, emergency numbers, your WhatsApp, how the appliances work, photos
Automatically translated into each guest's language
Real restaurant, sightseeing, and nightlife recommendations, with distance and a map. Generated automatically with AI or added by hand
You answer less, your guests enjoy more, and leave better reviews

features.title: A complete guide for property management, no hassle

items.title: Guest guide tailored to your property
items.description: WiFi, check-in, check-out, and house rules. All in one link you send just once.

items.title: Automatic translation
items.description: Your guest reads the guide in their own language, without you writing an extra word.

items.title: AI-curated local recommendations
items.description: What to see, where to eat, nightlife. Real places, real distances, and a Google Maps link.

items.title: Print-ready QR code
items.description: Stick it on the door or leave it on the table. Your guest scans it and they're in.

howItWorks.title: Publish your guide in three steps

steps.title: Add your stay
steps.description: Name, address, and the basics. Two minutes.

steps.title: Generate recommendations with one click
steps.description: AI finds and ranks the best of your area using real Google data.

steps.title: Share the link or the QR
steps.description: Your guest already has everything they need to know.

pricing.title: A plan for every Airbnb, Booking, or Vrbo host
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Grow when you need to.

finalCta.title: Ready to stop repeating your WiFi password?
finalCta.subtitle: Create your vacation rental's guide for free, no credit card needed.

footer.tagline: Everything your guests need to know, in one place

forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkEmailBody: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a link to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: New password

layout.emailNotConfirmed: You haven't confirmed your email yet ({email}). Check your inbox and confirm your account to be able to publish your guide.

common.imageStillTooLargeAfterCompression: The image is still too large even after compression. Try a smaller or lower-resolution image.

account.title: My account
account.phoneHelp: Used as a fallback for the contact button on your guides that don't have their own phone configured.
account.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number: country code + number (8-15 digits)

avatar.invalidType: Only JPG, PNG, or WebP images are accepted
avatar.tooLarge: The image can't be larger than 1MB

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting your account permanently removes your profile, all your properties, guides, content blocks, and recommendations.
dangerZone.confirmDescription: This action can't be undone. Your profile, all your properties, guides, and recommendations will be permanently deleted.

plan.downgradeError: Couldn't switch to the Free plan
plan.downgradeSuccess: You've switched to the Free plan

security.title: Change password
security.tooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters

editor.emptyState: Add your first block with the buttons above.

publish.title: Publishing
publish.publishHint: Publish the guide so you can view and share it with your guests.
publish.coverTooLarge: The image can't be larger than 3MB
publish.phoneHint: Country code + number, no spaces or +. E.g. 34612345678.
publish.phoneWarning: Without this number (or a personal phone in your profile), the contact button won't appear on your public guide.
publish.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number: country code + number (8-15 digits)

guestLinks.dialogDescription: Create a unique link for a guest's stay dates. It automatically stops working after check-out.
guestLinks.dateOrderError: The check-out date must be on or after the check-in date
guestLinks.noLinksYet: You haven't generated any links yet.
guestLinks.confirmDeleteDescription: Any guest holding this link will no longer be able to access the guide with it. This can't be undone.

airbnbImport.title: Import from Airbnb
airbnbImport.bestEffortHint: Best-effort: if Airbnb blocks access or we can't find some data, you can fill it in manually in the blocks below.
airbnbImport.importError: Couldn't import the listing. Fill in the data manually.
airbnbImport.networkError: Network error while importing. Fill in the data manually.
airbnbImport.suspiciousWarning: ⚠ looks like generic Airbnb text, review before applying
airbnbImport.extractedDataHint: Extracted data — uncheck what you don't want to apply
airbnbImport.importedSuspicious: Data imported — review the name/address, they weren't preselected because they look like generic Airbnb text.
airbnbImport.imported: Data imported — review it and confirm what to apply.
airbnbImport.applyNetworkError: Network error while saving the imported data

settings.importHintPrefix: Want to import this data from Airbnb? Do it from the
settings.importHintSuffix: tab — there you can review and confirm each piece of data before applying it, instead of overwriting it directly.
settings.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: Welcome to your home away from home. I hope you enjoy your stay...
settings.welcomeMessageHint: Appears right below the header in the public guide, before the content blocks.
settings.whatsappHint: If you set this, a fixed "Contact host" button will appear in the public guide.
settings.contentLanguageWarning: This field indicates what language this property's content is written in. Changing it doesn't translate the existing content — if you want the content in another language, you'll need to edit or regenerate it manually.

deleteProperty.description: Deleting "{name}" will make its guide unavailable to your guests immediately. You'll have 30 days to ask us to restore it before it's permanently deleted.
deleteProperty.confirmDescription: Its guide will become unavailable immediately. To confirm, type the exact property name: {name}

analyticsCard.title: Analytics
analyticsCard.description: Add your own IPs (home, office...) so your visits don't count in your hosts' stats.

hostsTable.impersonateConfirm: Log in as {email}? You'll see their dashboard exactly as they do, until you click "Back to admin".
hostsTable.planChangeDbOnlyWarning: This changes the plan only in the database — it doesn't create, modify, or cancel any Stripe subscription

propertiesTable.restoreConfirm: Restore "{name}"? It will become visible to the host again.
propertiesTable.purgeDialogDescription: This physically deletes the property and all its related data (recommendations, translations, guide, cover image). This can't be undone. To confirm, type:

excludedIps.description: Visits from these IPs are never recorded in any property's analytics — not counted as a visit, no country/city data either.
excludedIps.empty: You haven't excluded any IPs yet.
